meaning: n.閽堝埡鐤楁硶v.鏂借閽堝埡鐤楁硶
examples: I had acupuncture in my lower back.
Acupuncture treatment is gentle, painless, and relaxing.
Acupuncture has a harmonizing and energizing effect on mind and body.
They're used in medicine to inject liquids, patch skin and to stimulate acupuncture points.
There are also acupuncture, acupressure, biofeedback, Alexander, Reiki, Feldenkrais and other bodywork and postural techniques.
